title: How can I add multiple ‘people’ columns to the resource type settings in the Workload/Capacity dashboards?
excerpt: In our organization, we use multiple ‘people’ columns on tasks to indicate who is responsible for specific portions of the work. However, in the Workload/Capacity dashboards, I’m only able to select one ‘people’ column i…

posts.author: curiousad (curious )
posts.cookedHtml:
In our organization, we use multiple ‘people’ columns on tasks to indicate who is responsible for specific portions of the work. However, in the Workload/Capacity dashboards, I’m only able to select one ‘people’ column in the resource type settings, which limits our ability to get a full view of company workload and capacity.

Is there a workaround to include multiple ‘people’ columns in the dashboard, or is there an app that can help provide better visibility? Any suggestions would be appreciated!

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @curiousad, welcome to the monday community! I’d also like to hear if there is an app that can do this. If you don’t get an answer soon then you can post it as a feature request :).
